name: Southern Coastal
description_short: Southern Coastal Parts is a factory-certified parts supplier for premium appliance brands (Sub-Zero, Wolf, ASKO), not a financial services or payday lending company.
description_long: Southern Coastal Parts, Inc. is a parts supplier specializing in genuine factory-certified components for high-end appliance manufacturers. The company operates as a direct distributor for Sub-Zero, Wolf, and ASKO branded products, positioning itself as 'the preferred factory certified parts provider' for these brands. Based on the website content, the company offers same-day shipping on orders placed during business hours (8AM-5PM), with direct customer support via phone and email. The company maintains an online ordering system with a shopping cart interface and customer login functionality, allowing consumers and contractors to source replacement parts. Southern Coastal Parts distinguishes itself through exclusive factory certification partnerships with three premium appliance brands rather than operating as a general parts distributor. This specialization suggests a focus on high-end residential and commercial kitchen appliance repair. The website provides no evidence of financial services, lending products, credit-related services, or any payday lending activities whatsoever. The current categorization as a 'payday-alternatives' lender is factually incorrect and represents a significant data error in the CreditDoc database.
pros: Offers same-day shipping on orders placed during operating hours
Direct partnerships with premium brands (Sub-Zero, Wolf, ASKO)
Multiple contact methods including phone support and email
Online ordering system with customer account login
Established business model with dedicated parts inventory
cons: Limited hours of operation (8AM-5PM) may restrict customer support access
No evidence of online chat or after-hours support options
Website provides no pricing information visible without login
No information about warranty, returns, or satisfaction guarantees
Unclear geographic service area or shipping restrictions
best_for: Homeowners with Sub-Zero, Wolf, or ASKO appliances needing replacement parts
HVAC and appliance repair contractors sourcing factory-certified components
Property managers maintaining high-end kitchen equipment
diagnosis: Southern Coastal Parts is a specialized appliance parts supplier, not a financial services or lending company. This listing is categorically misplaced in a consumer finance database and should be removed or recategorized as a retail/e-commerce business.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
